prompt: Replace the background of the source image with a basketball court, keeping the masked player unchanged in pose, position, and appearance.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1 (the source image) by replacing its existing background with a photorealistic basketball court. The player from Image 1, as defined by the white region in Image 2 (the mask), must remain entirely unchanged in pose, position, and appearance. The new background should seamlessly match the photorealistic style, lighting, and perspective of the player in Image 1.
